# Heartwater

## Overview

Heartwater is the capital city of the kingdom, ruled by King Aldric and Queen Lydia. It's a prosperous trading hub built around a natural spring said to have healing properties.

## Districts

### Castle District
- Royal castle where the Ashworth family resides
- Noble estates
- Royal gardens (where Varen was kidnapped)

### Forge District
- Bartok's smithy
- Various craftsmen workshops
- Market square

### Harbor District
- Trading port
- Warehouses
- Taverns and inns

## Current Events

- The Festival of Lights was recently held
- Prince Varen's kidnapping has caused unrest
- King's curse is causing administrative chaos
